title: hieracium jankae subsp. tschairlicum
intro: Hieracium jankae subsp. tschairlicum is a subspecies of the Hieracium jankae plant, a type of flowering plant in the dandelion family, known for its yellow or reddish flowers. The plant is used in herbal medicine, particularly for its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Hieracium jankae subsp. tschairlicum include its ability to reduce inflammation and alleviate symptoms associated with gastrointestinal issues and wounds, as well as its potential to exhibit antioxidant and antifungal effects. Herbal preparations of the plant may include tea infusions or infusions in oil, which can be used to treat various health conditions, although further research is needed to confirm its effectiveness and safety.
